title: SootSpriteCraft
description: Adds Gibli's little mob soot sprite has a cute and useful helper
body:
# The little soot spirits have arrived in Minecraft!

Inspired by Studio Ghibli movies (*My Neighbor Totoro*, *Spirited Away*), these creatures add life, cuteness, and unique automation utilities to your world.

![walking soot sprite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b539dce910d7e989c13db4d87eb42535f0186bcc.png)

##  Key Features

### The Entity: Soot Sprite
Small soot balls with arms and legs that appear in **total darkness** (light level 0). They are shy, hardworking, and very curious.

* **Shy Behavior:** They will flee if you sprint towards them. To get close without scaring them, you must go **Sneaking (Shift)** or hold a **Star Candy**.
* **Stacking:** When they are bored and idle, they stack on top of each other to form wobbly towers!
* **Sounds:** They make high-pitched squeaks and cute noises (inspired by high-pitched bats).

### New Items
* **Star Candy (Konpeitō):** Colorful glowing candies. Found in dungeon chests or craftable (Sugar + Dyes).
    * They are irresistible to Sprites. Use them to attract and tame them.
    * Edible for the player (they give a small speed boost).

    ![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b861b72fd6dbb5c94d5b130fbb158ee552678a9c.png)
* **Glass Bottle & Soot Jar:** Right-click a Sprite with a **Glass Bottle** to catch it.
    * You will get a **Soot Jar** (Sprite in a jar), great for decoration or for transporting your friends from place to place.
    * Release it by right-clicking on the ground.![bootle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e91c27a659745ccbed757c3562a476e59b6a517d.png)

    ![soot jar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fb54fee84553781e308c8480e4c7971ec38b4da.png)
  
## Taming & Utility
You can earn a Sprite's trust by giving it **Star Candy**. They have a 33% chance of being tamed per candy (you will see hearts). Once tamed, they become **automatic helpers**:

### "Cute" Automation
Tamed Soot Sprites will work for you within a close radius:

* **Scavenge:** They pick up items from the ground, with a preference for **Coal** and **Candies**, but they will grab anything if their hands are empty.
* **Smart Storage:** If they pick up an item, they will look for nearby chests that **already contain that same item** and deposit it there. Automatic inventory organizers!
* **Furnace Feeding:** If they pick up fuel (Coal/Wood), they will look for active furnaces and refill them automatically.
* **Copper Golem (Buttons):** If they see an unpressed stone or wooden button, they will run to push it. Ideal for random farms or simply causing chaos!

## Progression (Advancements)
The mod includes its own achievements tab to guide you:
* **Dust Bunny:** Find your first trace of soot.
* **Sweet Tooth:** Tame a friend with sweets.
* **Full House:** Catch one in a jar to go.

## ⚙️ Technical Details
* **Fluid Animations:** Powered by **GeckoLib**, the sprites feature custom animations for walking, running, holding items (in one hand or over their head), and floating.
* **Advanced AI:** Dynamic priority system. They know when to work, when to play, and when to flee.
* **Visuals:** Black smoke particles when moving or disappearing.
